name: O-I Glass, Inc. /DE/
summary: PART I General Development of Business O-I Glass,Inc., a Delaware corporation (the Company), through its subsidiaries, is the successor to a business established in 1903. The Company is one of the leading manufacturers of glass containers in the world with 64glass manufacturing plants in 18 countries. It competes in the glass container segment of the rigid packaging market and is the leading glass container manufacturer in most of the countries where it has manufacturing facilities.
